description: 信息清晰度最高——均匀线条+平涂色块=零视觉噪音。适合精确信息传达。
base_style_prompt: Ligne Claire comic style with uniform line thickness and flat color blocks. Zero visual noise. 2-4 panel layout as needed. Emphasis on clarity and information precision. Minimal backgrounds, focus on subjects. Clean, modern aesthetic with European comic tradition.
